abstract: Metadata keys for the Camera Image File Format (CIFF) image format.

# CIFF Image Properties

**API Collection**

Metadata keys for the Camera Image File Format (CIFF) image format.

## Dictionary

- **kCGImagePropertyCIFFDictionary**: A dictionary of key-value pairs for an image that uses Camera Image File Format (CIFF).

## Image Details

- **kCGImagePropertyCIFFDescription**: The camera description.
- **kCGImagePropertyCIFFImageName**: The image name.
- **kCGImagePropertyCIFFImageFileName**: The image file name.
- **kCGImagePropertyCIFFImageSerialNumber**: The image serial number.

## Exposure

- **kCGImagePropertyCIFFWhiteBalanceIndex**: The white balance index.
- **kCGImagePropertyCIFFFlashExposureComp**: The flash exposure compensation.
- **kCGImagePropertyCIFFMeasuredEV**: The measured exposure value.
- **kCGImagePropertyCIFFMeteringMode**: The metering mode.

## Shutter Information

- **kCGImagePropertyCIFFReleaseTiming**: The priority for shutter release timing—shutter or focus.
- **kCGImagePropertyCIFFSelfTimingTime**: The time in milliseconds until shutter release when using the self-timer.
- **kCGImagePropertyCIFFReleaseMethod**: The method of shutter release—single-shot or continuous.
- **kCGImagePropertyCIFFContinuousDrive**: The continuous drive mode.
- **kCGImagePropertyCIFFShootingMode**: The shooting mode.

## Lens and Focus

- **kCGImagePropertyCIFFFocusMode**: The focus mode.
- **kCGImagePropertyCIFFLensMaxMM**: The maximum lens length in millimeters.
- **kCGImagePropertyCIFFLensMinMM**: The minimum lens length in millimeters.
- **kCGImagePropertyCIFFLensModel**: The lens model.

## Camera Information

- **kCGImagePropertyCIFFFirmware**: The firmware version of the camera.
- **kCGImagePropertyCIFFOwnerName**: The name of the camera’s owner.
- **kCGImagePropertyCIFFCameraSerialNumber**: The camera serial number.
- **kCGImagePropertyCIFFRecordID**: The number of images taken since the camera shipped.

## Format-Specific Properties

- **DNG Image Properties**: Metadata keys for the Digital Negative (DNG) archival format.
- **GIF Image Properties**: Metadata keys for the Graphics Interchange Format (GIF).
- **HEIC Image Properties**: Metadata keys for the High Efficiency Image Container (HEIC) format.
- **JFIF Image Properties**: Metadata keys for the JPEG File Interchange Format (JFIF).
- **PNG Image Properties**: Metadata keys for the Portable Network Graphics (PNG) format.
- **TGA Image Properties**: Metadata keys for the Truevision Graphics Adapter (TGA) format.
- **TIFF Image Properties**: Metadata keys for the Tagged Image File Format (TIFF).
- **8BIM Image Properties**: Metadata keys for the Adobe Photoshop image format.
